nodes.label: AI as collaborative brainstorming and learning partner
nodes.grounding_span: I like to collaborate with it, and don't like delegating too many tasks for it to handle independently

nodes.label: AI reliability and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: the AI replied with a hallucination. Twice in a row, when I tried to point out the hallucination, the AI doubled down on it

nodes.label: AI as skill development safeguard
nodes.label_negative: AI as crutch hindering skill growth
nodes.grounding_span: I am still a junior developer and don't want to be fully reliant on AI

nodes.label: Workplace-sanctioned AI use with caution
nodes.grounding_span: I am encouraged to use AI to speed up things when appropriate, but with obvious caution

nodes.label: AI as augmentation tool not replacement
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement for human skills
nodes.grounding_span: I see it as a tool to augment things, not replace me

nodes.label: Comfort with delegating large independent tasks
nodes.label_negative: Discomfort delegating due to need for review
nodes.grounding_span: I'm currently uncomfortable with that because I need to spend more time reviewing what the AI has done

nodes.label: Skill development and professional growth
nodes.grounding_span: I'm even more concerned with maintaining and expanding my programming skills

nodes.label: Epistemic understanding and verification
nodes.grounding_span: ask follow up questions to confirm my understanding or to confirm the AI is not hallucinating

nodes.label: Productivity and efficient task completion
nodes.grounding_span: I wanted to make it to my assigned task of exploring what an MCP server does instead of wasting time getting it running

nodes.label: Satisfaction with collaborative AI interaction
nodes.grounding_span: I like to collaborate with it

nodes.label: Concern about AI being too people-pleasing
nodes.grounding_span: I'm also often worried that AI is being too people-pleasing and always agreeing with my suggestions

nodes.label: Aspiration to become comfortable delegating large tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I would like to get comfortable enough with my skills to do that

nodes.label: Iterative verification through follow-up questions
nodes.grounding_span: ask follow up questions to confirm my understanding or to confirm the AI is not hallucinating

nodes.label: Preference for rewriting AI suggestions to maintain personal style
